hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && [ "$(git branch --show-current)" = 'main' ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: cannot commit to main, use a worktree+branch' >&2; exit 2; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && base=$(basename "$file") && [[ "$base" == ".env" ]] && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files directly — use .env.example instead' && exit 1 || true

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == /etc/systemd/* || "$file" == /lib/systemd/* || "$file" == /usr/lib/systemd/* ]] && echo 'BLOCKED: Direct edits to systemd unit files outside the repo are not allowed. Update deploy/audiobook-organizer.service in the repo instead, then copy it to the server manually.' >&2 && exit 2 || true

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == */web/src/*.ts* || "$file" == */web/src/*.css ]] && dir=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && npx --prefix "$dir/web" prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.go ]] && dir=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && cd "$dir" && go vet ./$(dirname "${file#$dir/}")/... 2>&1 | head -5 || true

st=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --short 2>/dev/null); [[ -n "$st" ]] && jq -n --arg s "$st" '{"systemMessage": ("Uncommitted changes:
" + $s + "

Remember: CHANGELOG + TODO + commit")}' || true
